footer.poweredBy: Powered by Gemini API • Built for modern product teams

wizard.yourIdeaDesc: Tell us about your product in a few sentences, and we'll help you build a comprehensive PRD.
wizard.productIdeaPlaceholder: e.g., A mobile app that helps remote workers find and book coworking spaces with real-time availability...
wizard.productIdeaDesc: Describe your product concept, target users, and key features in your own words.
wizard.addVisualContextDesc: Attach mockups, diagrams, wireframes, or reference photos to help the AI better understand your product idea.
wizard.reviewDesc: We've pre-filled your PRD based on your idea. Review and edit any section as needed.
wizard.productNamePlaceholder: e.g., Apollo - The AI Trip Planner
wizard.problemStatementPlaceholder: What problem does your product solve?
wizard.keyFeaturesPlaceholder: What are the main features that differentiate your product?
wizard.keyFeaturesDesc: List the key differentiating features that make your product unique and valuable.
wizard.successMetricsDesc: Define specific, measurable KPIs and targets to track product success (e.g., User retention > 40%, 10k MAU in 6 months).
wizard.prdReadyDesc: Here's your generated Product Requirements Document. You can download it, copy it, or view in full page mode.

form.productNamePlaceholder: e.g., Apollo - The AI Trip Planner
form.problemStatementDesc: What specific problem is this product trying to solve for its users?
form.problemStatementPlaceholder: e.g., Planning a group trip is chaotic and time-consuming...
form.proposedSolutionDesc: Briefly describe how your product solves this problem.
form.proposedSolutionPlaceholder: e.g., A mobile app that centralizes itineraries, budgets, and communication...
form.targetAudienceDesc: Who are the primary users of this product? Be specific.
form.targetAudiencePlaceholder: e.g., Tech-savvy millennials aged 25-40 who frequently travel in groups...
form.businessGoalsDesc: What are the key business objectives and how will you measure success (KPIs)?
form.businessGoalsPlaceholder: e.g., Goal: Achieve 10,000 monthly active users in 6 months. KPI: User retention rate > 30%...
form.coreFeaturesDesc: List the absolute essential features for the first version. Use bullet points or numbered lists.
form.coreFeaturesPlaceholder:
- Collaborative Itinerary Planning
- Shared Expense Tracking
- Group Chat
form.futureFeaturesDesc: What are some potential features for future releases?
form.futureFeaturesPlaceholder:
- Booking integrations (flights, hotels)
- AI-powered recommendations
- Offline mode
form.constraintsDesc: Are there any known technical limitations, budget constraints, or dependencies?
form.constraintsPlaceholder: e.g., Must integrate with Stripe API for payments. Budget is limited to $50k for MVP.

settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.modelFetchError: Could not fetch models. Using default list.
settings.unlimitedDesc: Token limits are removed for maximum flexibility. The API will generate as much content as needed for comprehensive PRDs.

drafts.title: Saved PRDs
drafts.emptyDesc: Generate and save your first PRD to see it here!
drafts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this draft?

prdDisplay.viewFullDocDesc: Open in full page view for better reading experience

refine.title: REFINE "{section}"
refine.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g., "Make the tone more formal" or "Add a feature for social media sharing."
refine.feedbackDesc: Provide instructions for the AI to edit this section.

pwa.installDesc: Install this app on your device for quick access and offline support

page.setupDesc: Add your Gemini API key to start generating PRDs

loader.thinking: The AI is thinking. This may take a moment.
